final:
module pipo_register (
    input clk,
    input resetn,
    input [3:0] data_in,
    output reg [3:0] data_out);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (~resetn)
        data_out <= 4'b0000;
    else
        data_out <= data_in;
end
endmodule
